std.value: Lucy is introducing us to the "Crossing Tongji Bridge" activity in Foshan. It has a history of over four hundred years. Every year, Lucy and her parents carry windmills and lettuce as they walk across the bridge. People believe this brings them good luck. The streets are lively with lion dances, bright lights and yummy food.

info.value: Hi, I'm Lucy! Let me introduce you to a traditional activity in Foshan. Every year on the Lantern Festival, there's a special event called "Crossing Tongji Bridge." It has a history of over 400 years. I go with my parents every year. We carry windmills and lettuce as we walk across the bridge. People believe this brings them good luck. The streets are so lively with lion dances, bright lights, and yummy food. It's always a fun and happy time for me.
info.analyze:
你将听到一段独白：Lucy介绍佛山民俗活动“行通济”。录音播放两遍。请根据所听到的内容，选择思维导图中的正确的信息（二选一），在50秒钟内转述该独白，包含以下要点。


Lucy is introducing us to the "Crossing Tongji Bridge" activity in Foshan. ...
